title: Intrena - Flexible and fun learning tailored to your company and your employees
text:
Create Manage Measure Content Pricing Español Log in Request a demo
Enhance employees performance in workplace safety

Increase revenue and lower costs through effective mobile training.

Learn More
Increase participation

We double the participation of your employees in learning.

Increase completion

We increase by 400% the number of employees who successfully complete learning processes.

Reduce costs

We lower the cost of learning processes by 90%.

When your employees have the knowledge, they work at their best

Our unique solution of microlearning, brain science and gamification takes the tedious out of learning, and motivates people to participate. Also, you can measure the impact on results.

Gamification

Learning becomes much more attractive to people when elements of gamification are integrated. Thus, corporate training ignites the competitive spirit of people and makes learning fun.

Microlearning

Fragmented content is delivered to your employees in short learning sessions (4 to 6 minutes per day) on the device of their choice.

Brain science

We take advantage of the techniques of brain science, such as spaced repetition, fragmentation and feedback to improve the absorption of knowledge.

Create content
 
Manage learning
 
Measure results
Create content

Create and edit almost instantly Intrena courses with our intuitive and simple platform with just a few clicks.

Manage learning

Close skill gaps with individualized learning programs.

Measure results

Implement tools that allow you to measure everything from employee's knowledge to the behaviors that impact business performance.

Content

Our library includes dozens of lessons on professional topics. Management, soft skills, digital tools, compliance, sales and customer support - it's all here.
